content.text:
Perfect! I've successfully implemented both requested updates to your analytics dashboard:

## ✅ **Updates Completed**

### **1. Bubble Chart Labels (4th Key)**

**Enhanced the bubble chart to display labels on each bubble:**

- **Label Detection Logic**: Automatically uses the 4th key for labels:
  - **Priority 1**: First string field (e.g., name, category, label)
  - **Priority 2**: 4th numeric field (if no strings available)
  - **Fallback**: Any available key from the data

- **Custom Label Renderer**: Created a custom SVG text component that:
  - Centers the label within each bubble
  - Uses dark gray color (#1f2937) for readability
  - Sets font size to 11px and bold weight
  - Positions dynamically based on bubble center (cx, cy)

- **Label Integration**: Added the `label` prop to the `Scatter` component to render labels on all bubbles

**Example**: If your data has fields like `[price, quantity, revenue, productName]`, the bubbles will show:
- **X-axis**: price
- **Y-axis**: quantity  
- **Size**: revenue
- **Label**: productName (displayed inside each bubble)

### **2. Collapsible Filter Panel**

**Made the FilterPanel collapsible with the same UX as ConfigurationPanel:**

- **Added State Management**: Used `useState` hook to track open/closed state (defaults to collapsed)

- **Clickable Header**: Full-width button with:
  - "Filters" title on the left
  - Animated chevron icon on the right (rotates 180° when open)
  - Hover effect for better UX

- **Conditional Content**: Filter controls only render when `isOpen === true`

- **Consistent Styling**: Matches the ConfigurationPanel design:
  - Same border treatment
  - Same padding structure
  - Same transition animations
  - Border separator between header and content

**Benefit**: This creates a cleaner dashboard view by default, allowing users to expand filters only when needed, reducing visual clutter.

## 🎨 **Visual Improvements**

Both panels now have a consistent collapsible interface, making the dashboard more compact and professional. The bubble chart labels provide immediate context for each data point without needing to hover for tooltips.

The changes are live in your running development server - refresh the page to see the collapsible Filter panel and add a bubble chart endpoint to test the labels!
